title: borreria involucrata
intro: Borreria involucrata, also known as the false buttonweed or small buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is often used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Borreria involucrata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Borreria involucrata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to make a decoction, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
